name: ABodyBuilder3
description: Rapidly predict antibody structures given H and L sequences using language model embeddings. State of the art accuracy in modeling CDR loops, with 80% of models passing pLDDT threshold of 85 having RMSD below 2A.
capabilities: Rapidly predict antibody structures given H and L sequences using language model embeddings
State of the art accuracy in modeling CDR loops, with 80% of models passing pLDDT threshold of 85 having RMSD below 2A

heavySequence.description: Heavy chain (VH) amino acid sequence of the antibody

lightSequence.description: Light chain (VL) amino acid sequence of the antibody
